---
title: "Tests"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source('assets/setup.R')
library(xaringanExtra)
xaringanExtra::use_panelset()
```

# Header 1

## Header 2

:::lo
learning obj
:::

:::sticky
sticky
:::

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
#### tip
this is a tip
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
#### note
this is a note
:::

::: {.callout-important collapse="true"}
#### important
this is an important thing
:::

::: {.callout-warning collapse="true"}
#### warning
this is a warning
:::

::: {.callout-caution collapse="true"}
#### Rabbit Hole:  
this is a caution callout. repurposed as a rabbit hole. 
:::


:::divider
:::

## Header 2

### Header 3

:::rtip
r tips
:::

:::int
interprtation
interprtation
interprtation
:::


#### Header 4



::::panelset
:::panel
#### panelA
this is not a panel (jokes, it is)
:::
:::panel
#### panelB
this is a panel
:::
:::panel
#### panelC
this is a panel
:::

::::
